历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 22555 → 26762 → 29342 → 28408 → 33317, showing a continuous backward trend overall, with a cumulative backward shift of about 10762 positions over the past 5 years; in 2025, it shifted backward by about 4909 positions compared to 2024, with the backward speed significantly accelerating, and the 2025 baseline is about 33317 positions; the provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 143 in 2021 → 150 in 2022 → 157 in 2023 → 159 in 2024 → 173 in 2025, with a gradual small expansion each year; the 2026 plan is 192, an expansion of about 11% compared to 2025, with a larger expansion rate than the recent average, which will somewhat alleviate the backward shift in rankings.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class construction university; the Soft Science main ranking has steadily risen from 94th in 2021 to 86th in 2026, with continuous improvement in recent years, reflecting the enhancement of the school's comprehensive strength; reputation is stable, with no major negative public opinion or admission cutoff gaps in recent years; Douyin popularity ranking is 25th (relatively hot), with a comprehensive popularity of about 1.83 million, short video exposure at the upper-middle level among 211 universities, indicating relatively high application attention.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering and Automation, etc., are highly popular and recommended in society, highly relevant to Guangxi University's Physics Category enrollment majors, with strong appeal of popular majors; the number of Physics Category examinees in Hunan Province in 2026 is about 347,000, an increase of about 8.4% compared to 2025, with the examinee scale continuing to expand, intensifying competition; Guangxi University is located in Nanning, Guangxi, adjacent to Hunan, with high regional acceptance for cross-province applications; the university's enrollment plan in Hunan accounts for a relatively high proportion, with 173 Physics Category and 25 History Category students in 2025, making it one of the out-of-region 211 universities with a larger enrollment in Hunan.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, the alleviating effect of the 2026 enrollment plan expansion of about 11% on the backward shift, the intensified competition due to an 8.4% increase in Hunan Physics Category examinees, and the enhanced appeal from the school's rising ranking and relatively hot Douyin popularity, based on the 2025 baseline of 33317 positions, the ranking is expected to continue shifting backward but with the magnitude constrained by the expansion; the predicted minimum ranking is about 35612, with a range of 35112–36112.

Given that agriculture and forestry majors account for a considerable proportion of Guangxi University's Physics Category enrollment and have relatively low social popularity, candidates with rankings close to the upper bound of the range have a higher probability of being admitted to Tier 3 majors.

预测结论.text: Considering the historical backward trend in rankings, the strong mitigating effect of the 44% enrollment expansion in 2026 on the backward shift, the intensified competition due to a 31.2% increase in History Category examinees in Hunan Province, and the enhanced attractiveness from the school's rising ranking and high popularity, based on the 2025 baseline of 5765 places, the ranking is expected to shift backward, but the expansion effect significantly suppresses the extent of the shift; the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 7087 places, with a range of 6587–7587 places.
